title: Vault Ore Borders Pack!
description: This adds Borders to Vault Ores
body:
**This Pack Adds Ore Borders to Vault Hunter's Ores!**

`REMEMBER this only Works with VaultHunter's ModPack,
NOW UPADTED TO 1.18.2 VaultHunters UPDATE 15+`

![White Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f46826e71ecd92db06ec3dcc496aef52b4f60a0b.png)

![VaultStone Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/219ba581fc7dbd5c91b2bbb514c3b8b08f145e22.png)

![StoneOres](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4945ab0a54f3f907b203d0c602819ed255be5a83.jpeg)


How to install:

Go to the escape menu and press "Options"

Then press "Resource Packs"

In here, press "Open Pack Folder" This should open a folder.

Drag and drop the resource pack in that folder

The resource pack should now be available in the menu
 

Mod pack Download: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/vault-hunters-official-modpack

Mod Download: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vault-hunters-official-mod

 

Use this as you wish & if you use this a stream/video Please Provide Credits!
ThankYou -DGA
